data.body: PLACEMENT CLARIFICATION (dry-run feedback): apply the file-impact union ONCE, immediately AFTER the analyze_file_impact if/else block closes in Candidate.__init__ (i.e., after the else-branch assignment of self.files/self.files_read), so both branches receive it — do NOT duplicate the union inside each branch. self.files is a set in both branches; set(self.files) | declared is type-safe.
